allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Lystic Lavish Beauty Bar website

- Next.js 14+ with App Router and TypeScript
- Luxury UI/UX with Tailwind CSS \(champagne/gold/espresso palette\)
- Full booking flow with 5-step stepper
- Google Calendar & Sheets API integration
- Square Payments SDK integration
- All services seeded \(Facials, Waxing, Eye Enhancement, Makeup\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe auth login --web --git-protocol https)

Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" repo create lysticlavish --public --source=. --remote=origin --push --description "Lystic Lavish Beauty Bar - Luxury beauty services website with booking system")
